summary.sosovalue: Community sentiment around SoSoValue on April 20-21, 2026, appears predominantly promotional and positive, driven by user shares of official tutorials on EXP Real-User Verification for Season 2 airdrop eligibility, highlighting steps like the Crypto Native Quiz (15%), SoDEX activation (30%), and on-chain paths (60%). Key discussions revolve around helping friends complete verifications, speculation on snapshot dates around April 24-25 with distributions in May, daily check-ins on market flows like BTC/ETH ETF inflows, and integrations with SoDEX trading incentives. Metrics show low individual engagement (mostly 1 like, 0-46 views per post), but quoted official SoSoValue posts have high traction (e.g., 8415 likes, 2180 reposts, 109K views on verification video; 3650 likes on ETF flows), indicating indirect hype amplification rather than organic buzz, with some spam-like referrals and conviction posts on potential large airdrops (150M $SOSO pool). No negative mentions found.
summary.sodex: Sentiment for Sodex is neutral to positive amid low-volume discussions, focusing on recent maintenance completion for v3 upgrade praised for 60-minute execution and high-performance trading enhancements, alongside ongoing campaigns like $CL-USD positions with $SOSO rewards tied to US-Iran talks. Users encourage trading on Sodex for liquidity incentives from the 150M $SOSO pool, noting low slippage and SoPoints earnings, with one post highlighting 100+ points from 20K spot volume. Engagement remains minimal (e.g., 1 like on maintenance repost, official posts at 95 likes/24 reposts), suggesting niche interest without widespread hype; no explicit questions or criticisms observed.
summary.ssi: No significant mentions found for SSI Index specifically within the queried period excluding official accounts; discussions tangentially reference SSI protocol in broader SoSoValue contexts like staking MAG7.ssi or DEFI.ssi for exposure to rebalanced baskets with over $100M TVL and loyalty points in Epoch 4, but no dedicated posts or metrics on SSI standalone.
